summary: Re-verified full login + register + logout + protected-route flow on public URL (https://kirana-tracker-6.preview.emergentagent.com). Backend /api/auth/login returns 200, sets httpOnly access_token & refresh_token cookies, and /api/auth/me returns admin user. Frontend UI login with admin@kirana.shop/admin123 navigates to Home dashboard, register with unique email navigates to Home, logout redirects to /login, and visiting / while logged out redirects to /login. No CORS errors in browser console. User's re-report likely due to stale cache/cookies on their side — auth is working end-to-end.
passed: curl POST /api/auth/login 200 + httpOnly access_token & refresh_token cookies set on kirana-tracker-6.preview.emergentagent.com
curl GET /api/auth/me 200 returns admin user with role=admin
UI login (admin@kirana.shop/admin123) → navigates to /, home-title visible, stat-pending-orders & stat-low-stock cards rendered
Browser cookies after UI login include httpOnly access_token & refresh_token
UI register (qa+<ts>@kirana.shop / Test@1234) → navigates to /, home-title visible
Protected route: GET / while logged out → redirects to /login
action_items: No code changes needed. If user still reports failure, ask them to hard-refresh / clear cookies for the preview domain — auth pipeline is verified green.
